title: vLLM KVCache Analysis
description: vLLM KVCache Analysis documents KVCache behavior for vLLM in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as a concept page for the serving-system class, covering vLLM settings, KVConnectorBaseV1 worker flow, and prefill flow. It links to the science-domain Sliding Window Attention KVCache note for general cache-size analysis. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
